notes: Only four dinner highlight items were captured from what appears to be a landing/marketing page for Tanoor's Sammamish location (not Seattle/Greenwood); no prices were listed anywhere on the page, and the full menu was not rendered. Beverage list absent entirely.

dishes.name: Ribeye Steak
dishes.description: 12 oz. ribeye steak served with grilled vegetable kabob and Batata Harra

dishes.name: Dajaj Mishweh
dishes.description: Half grilled garlic-lemon chicken with spices, tomato, onion, parsley, Toum, choice of rice and side order

dishes.name: Tanoor Lamb Chops
dishes.description: Half rack of chargrilled lamb with grilled vegetable kabob, tomato, onion, parsley, Tzatziki, choice of rice and side order

dishes.name: GF Chicken Strips
dishes.description: 4 pieces, gluten-free and dairy-free chicken strips served with corn, one side order, and toum
